name: tristanmanchester--assemblyai-transcribe
description: Transcribe, diarise, translate, post-process, and structure audio/video with AssemblyAI. Use this skill when the user wants AssemblyAI specifically, needs high-quality speech-to-text from a local file or URL, wants speaker labels or named speakers, language detection, subtitles, paragraph/sentence exports, topic/entity/sentiment extraction, Speech Understanding, or agent-friendly transcript output as Markdown or normalised JSON for downstream AI workflows.
